inputs.titre: Fin de la dynastie Han en Chine

reason: The image depicts a scene that seems plausibly set during the fall of the Han Dynasty. The clothing of the courtiers, the architecture of the building with its wooden screens and heavy draperies, and the use of candles for lighting all seem period-appropriate. There are no immediately apparent anachronisms or fantastical elements. Some modern candles may be used, but this doesn't break the scene's overall veracity.
